creator: rockkid@mail.ru
text:
When I do "make install clean", I see configuration window. But it don't draw the check boxes... 
I think it's small truble, but it's BUG! =)

Fix: 

edit /etc/rc.conf
hand_enable="yes"

/usr/sbin/hans start 
=)
How-To-Repeat: just 
cd /usr/ports/net/samba3
make install clean
=)
